effects.effect: You target a Vivosaur you control; apply Quicken to that Vivosaur.

effects.name: Constrict
effects.effect: After this Vivosaur used an Attack Skill: the defending Vivosaur cannot swap Vivosaur Zones until the end of your Opponent's turn.

effects.name: Tophis Hiss
effects.effect: Flip 4 coins. If all land heads: the defending Vivosaur's LP becomes 0. If at least 1 is heads: apply Sleep to the defending Vivosaur.
